danger_signals.visual_form: Muddy/polluted water in rivers and lakes
danger_signals.meaning: Environmental degradation caused by Zerah; indicates danger to population health and safety

danger_signals.visual_form: Affected NPCs in towns showing illness or absence
danger_signals.meaning: Direct consequence of water pollution; world-state of crisis and suffering
Inaccessible objective; indicates magical danger and separation from solution

danger_signals.visual_form: Monsters ranging from insects to giant bosses in dungeons and landscapes
danger_signals.meaning: Physical threats aligned with forces of Darkness; escalating danger as player progresses
Ultimate source of darkness; existential threat to Lakeland

safety_signals.meaning: Safe zones for interaction, resource gathering, and NPC dialogue

safety_signals.visual_form: Player character Nasir with sword and light-aligned equipment
safety_signals.meaning: Hero protagonist aligned with forces opposing Darkness; player empowerment
Established authority and support structure; source of wisdom and preparation

safety_signals.visual_form: NPC with unique role and power
safety_signals.meaning: Key ally with narrative authority and magical ability to resolve crisis

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Monsters, insects, giant bosses; Thor (skilled swordsman with mismatched eyes); Duma and Battler (henchmen)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Polluted water, dungeons, corrupted landscapes, elevated castle

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Lakeland described as prosperous country with families and healthy population
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: NPCs conduct normal activities; water systems flow cleanly

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Muddy/polluted water in all rivers and lakes; Lagoon Castle lifted into clouds; visual signs of sickness in towns
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Population suffering illness and death; hero summons/emerges as necessity; quest activation

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Player clearing dungeons and defeating bosses; approaching inaccessible castle; gathering allies
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Nasir gains experience, equipment, and NPC support; environment responds to player advancement

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Evil Spirit hidden beneath castle; requires princess's power to access Secret Place
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Locked areas and gated progression; narrative dependency on key NPCs

environmental_storytelling.example: Muddy water visible in rivers and lakes communicates Zerah's corruption without exposition; visual metaphor for spreading contamination
Lagoon Castle elevated into clouds; unreachable structure signals magical threat and lost hope; later accessibility marks progress
Sick or absent NPCs in towns visually communicate impact of pollution on civilian populations; environmental consequences
Escalating enemy difficulty and boss encounters visually map player's approach to source of evil; geography follows narrative tension
Thor's mismatched eye colors serve as visual identifier for alignment with Darkness; distinctive appearance marks faction allegiance

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Skilled swordsman; displays courage and intelligence; actively seeks monsters and dungeons
Pollutes water systems; elevates castle; raises child of Darkness; seeks to resurrect Evil Spirit; commands henchmen
Skilled combatant; serves as obstacle or boss encounter; visual marker of high-level threat
Possesses unique magical power; can move castle and open Secret Place; essential for quest completion
Patrol dungeons and landscapes; escalate in difficulty as player advances; drop experience and items on defeat
Trained Nasir from infancy; represents established order and Light alignment; provides wisdom

notes: Lagoon employs classical fantasy RPG visual language combining environmental corruption as thematic core with faction binaries (Light vs. Darkness). The central manifestation mechanic is water quality: polluted water signals crisis state across all zones, creating unified visual grammar for world corruption. Castle elevation into clouds creates inaccessible objective that structures narrative and player progression. Character visual markers (mismatched eyes for Thor, light-champion identity for Nasir) enable quick faction recognition. The game uses dungeon density and monster escalation to visually communicate proximity to narrative danger. NPC presence/absence in towns reflects world-state impact on civilian life. This is a T3-tier game with limited graphical sophistication on SNES, relying heavily on spatial arrangement, water sprite variation, and NPC availability to convey world-state rather than detailed visual effects.
